scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p dist && cp -r out dist/out && bun build --compile --target bun-linux-x64 serve.ts --outfile dist/designer-faq-linux && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-x64 serve.ts --outfile dist/designer-faq-mac-intel && bun build --compile --target bun-darwin-arm64 serve.ts --outfile dist/designer-faq-mac-arm && bun build --compile --target bun-windows-x64 serve.ts --outfile dist/designer-faq-windows.exe
